name: Can I still get workers comp checks if my job says they don't have any light duty work available?
description: Yes. If your employer cannot accommodate your doctor-ordered light duty restrictions, you are typically eligible for Temporary Total Disability (TTD) benefits,

mainEntity.name: Can I still get workers comp checks if my job says they don't have any light duty work available?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. If your employer cannot accommodate your doctor-ordered light duty restrictions, you are typically eligible for Temporary Total Disability (TTD) benefits, which compensate you for lost wages while you recover.
